s: In 1995, Kenny Robinson suited up for TOR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.690, WHIP 1.210, SO 31, WAR -0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (TOR -> KCR).

Changed teams after the previous season (KCR -> TOR).
